backlog_issues.title: Build a custom WHMCS MCP server (migrated from FFC-IN-AI-Management#3)
Epic: WHMCS fraud review via FraudLabs Pro + daily agent check (charities mis-flagged as fraud)
Epic: process assurance — verify the Agentic OS's own processes keep working (monitor the monitors)
Consolidate Cloudflare record-writing: one engine for the apex/www Pages standard + shared API lib
Migrate remaining value out of FFC-IN-AI-Management into the hub (inventory + first tranche)
Fleet: upload-pages-artifact@v5 silently drops dot-entries — .well-known/security.txt 404s on affected sites
Publish FFC Zeffy campaign list for smoke auto-classification (charity-specific vs ffc-interim donations)
Canary drill: prove the smoke engine catches each failure class it claims (child of #752)
Conditional basePath missing: default-Pages-URL sites serve pages with 404 assets (technomonasteries, Footer_Only_Template; audit fleet)
Standardize on pnpm across FFC templates and repos (migrated from FFC-IN-AI-Management#9)
Build a custom Zeffy MCP server (migrated from FFC-IN-AI-Management#2)
Fleet-status donation badges + campaigns dashboard page on ffcadmin (child of #745)
Epic: charity campaign registry — capture and track every Zeffy campaign across FFC-supported sites, surfaced in the dashboards
Epic: unify fleet smoke patterns into one Agentic-OS-integrated verification system with public visual fleet status
Repo hygiene for the cutover test target FFC-EX-technologymonastery.org (child of #726)

in_flight_prs.title: docs: WHMCS MCP server implementation design (read-only v1) (Refs #770)

conductor_log.author: clarkemoyer
conductor_log.body:
## Conductor run 26 — START (2026-07-22 04:04Z)

Scheduled run. Agenda: promote draft PR #807 (run-25 tier-c docs lesson), review pending gates (4 carried, no re-nag per doctrine), supervise open agentic-os PRs, backlog/board upkeep, health sweep. Morning cron stack (05:17Z bulldogz smoke, 06:38Z claim sweep, etc.) fires after this run — the 07:04Z run verifies.

conductor_log.author: clarkemoyer
conductor_log.body:
## Conductor run 26 — END (2026-07-22 ~04:2xZ)

**PR #807 MERGED** (c98f684, 04:11:13Z) — AGENTS.md claim-sync docs fix. Fixed + resolved the one Copilot thread (clarified: claim release fires only when the *last* open linked PR closes), supersession clean, ready → queue → merge group green → merged. Board → Done. Post-merge verify: #752 labels clean.

**Gates**: same 4 pending, untouched per doctrine (no re-nag; today's 08:00Z 502 + 13:00Z Drift instances supersede two of them). Zero action_req…

conductor_log.body:
